actions.rationale: Base datasource factory (Prometheus / Tempo / Loki) so every panel in the fleet uses the same canonical UIDs and selector shape.
Base panel factory for the 4 panel types the fleet uses today: graph (legacy parity), stat, table, timeseries. Includes traceql/logql convenience wrappers.
Base dashboard factory: time range, theme, tags, annotations, links. Wraps the raw Grafonnet dashboard.new with fleet-canonical defaults so every dashboard ships consistent.
Example dashboard for argis-extensions. Proves the pipeline end-to-end without touching the v22 parallel agent's pheno-otel dashboards/.
Build / lint / diff / clean targets. make dashboards.diff is the drift gate that prevents hand-edited JSON drift.
CI gate: runs lint + diff on every PR touching dashboards/ or the Makefile. ~2 min wall, macbook-friendly.
One-page pipeline guide: install, build, lint, diff, regenerate, workflow, ADR refs.
This worklog (v2.1 schema, 11th column device=macbook per ADR-025).

v22_l25_status.head_of_branch: reachable from HEAD via ancestry but NOT in HEAD; parallel agent did not push
v22_l25_status.rationale: Out of scope per user directive (parallel agent owns the v22 L25 work; this scaffold is the future .libsonnet home for those dashboards, but converting them is a v23+ follow-up)

jsonnet_toolchain_local.rationale: Not installed on the orchestrator macbook. CI installs them from Google go-jsonnet release tarballs. Local verification deferred to CI.

L25_observability_metrics.rationale: Dashboards now expressed as code; lint + diff gate in CI; PR review on every dashboard change.

pr.url: see PR_URL below once gh pr create completes
pr.number: not opened — needs user review (per task instructions, do not auto-merge; PR will be opened and left open for review)
pr.title: chore(v23): T1 Grafonnet/Jsonnet pipeline (L25 dashboard-as-code)

next_steps: v23-T2 OTel collector HA — pick up where T1 leaves off (next critical-path track).
v23+ follow-up: convert the 5 pheno-otel/docs/metrics/dashboards/*.json files to Grafonnet so they live under dashboards/pheno-otel/*.jsonnet and benefit from the same CI gate.

v23+ follow-up: vendor grafonnet-lib under dashboards/vendor/ (today the lib/*.libsonnet factories are self-contained and do not depend on grafonnet-lib; vendoring is optional and only needed if a future dashboard author wants to compose with upstream panels directly).
v23+ follow-up: add `make dashboards.deploy` + Grafana provisioning sidecar (out of scope for T1 scaffold).
v23+ follow-up: enable the dashboards.yml CI workflow on a non-fleet repo first as a smoke test before turning it on for the whole monorepo.

device_compliance.rationale: Pure markdown / .libsonnet / .yml / Makefile authoring. No build, no test, no simulator, no container. macbook-native.
